tables.name: structure_projects
tables.schema_sql: project_id STRING, uniprot_accession STRING, pdb_id STRING, method STRING, resolution FLOAT, space_group STRING, status STRING, created_date STRING, completed_date STRING

tables.name: refinement_cycles
tables.schema_sql: project_id STRING, cycle_number INT, r_work FLOAT, r_free FLOAT, r_gap FLOAT, map_model_cc FLOAT, molprobity_score FLOAT, ramachandran_favored FLOAT, ramachandran_outliers FLOAT, clash_score FLOAT, rotamer_outliers FLOAT, refinement_strategy STRING, parameters_json STRING, model_path STRING, notes STRING, timestamp STRING

tables.name: validation_reports
tables.schema_sql: uniprot_accession STRING, source STRING, molprobity_score FLOAT, ramachandran_favored FLOAT, ramachandran_outliers FLOAT, clash_score FLOAT, rotamer_outliers FLOAT, cbeta_deviations INT, report_path STRING, model_path STRING, validation_date STRING

tables.name: alphafold_structures
tables.schema_sql: uniprot_accession STRING, pdb_path STRING, cif_path STRING, pae_path STRING, n_residues INT, n_domains INT, mean_plddt FLOAT, retrieval_date STRING
